suites.title: cellarlite-full-implementation-next-js-1.spec.ts
US-0.1: View Full Bottle List

specs.title: navigating to / renders without login screen
each bottle shows name, vintage, varietal, quantity, and location
bottles are ordered newest-first (by created_at)
page is server-rendered — list visible on initial load without spinner
page title or heading reads "My Cellar"

suites.title: US-0.2: View Empty-State When Cellar Has No Bottles

specs.title: "No bottles yet" visible when cellar is empty
"Add bottle" button visible in empty state
clicking "Add bottle" in empty state navigates to /bottles/new
no bottle rows rendered in empty state
empty-state message distinct from search-empty (no ?q= present)

suites.title: US-0.3: Navigate to Edit Page from List Row

specs.title: each bottle row is clickable and links to /bottles/[id]/edit
clicking a row navigates to correct edit page
tap target for each row is at least 44px tall

suites.title: US-0.4: Navigate to Add Bottle from List Page

specs.title: Add bottle button visible regardless of empty/populated cellar
clicking Add bottle navigates to /bottles/new
button tap target is at least 44x44px

suites.title: US-1.1: Add a New Bottle with All Fields

specs.title: /bottles/new renders form with all fields
each field has a visible label
submitting all fields creates bottle and redirects to /
new bottle appears in list with all fields

suites.title: US-1.2: Add a Bottle with Name Only

specs.title: submitting only name succeeds and redirects to /
bottle appears in list with name shown and optional fields blank
quantity defaults to 1 when left blank

suites.title: US-1.3: Prevented from Submitting Without a Name

specs.title: clicking submit with empty name shows "Name is required" error
error shown for whitespace-only name
other field values are preserved after failed validation

suites.title: US-1.4: Cancel Adding a Bottle

specs.title: "Cancel" link is visible on /bottles/new
clicking Cancel navigates back to / without creating a record

suites.title: US-2.1: Open Edit Page with Pre-Populated Fields

specs.title: edit page shows all five fields pre-populated
each pre-populated field has a visible label

suites.title: US-2.2: Update Bottle Quantity

specs.title: changing quantity from 3 to 2 and saving redirects to /
bottle list shows updated quantity after save
quantity can be set to 0 (last bottle consumed)

suites.title: US-2.3: Update Any Bottle Field

specs.title: changing name reflects new name in list
changing location reflects new location in list
updated values persist after page reload

suites.title: US-2.4: Prevented from Saving Without a Name

specs.title: clearing name and clicking save shows "Name is required"
other field values preserved after failed save

suites.title: US-2.5: Cancel Editing a Bottle

specs.title: "Cancel" link is visible on edit page
clicking Cancel navigates to / without saving changes

suites.title: US-2.6: Handle Navigation to Non-Existent Bottle

specs.title: /bottles/99999/edit shows "Bottle not found" message
link back to / visible on not-found page
/bottles/abc/edit also shows "Bottle not found"

suites.title: US-3.1: Delete a Bottle with Confirmation

specs.title: "Delete" button visible on edit page
clicking Delete + confirming dialog removes bottle and redirects to /
deleted bottle does not reappear on page reload

suites.title: US-3.2: Cancel Deletion — No Change Made

specs.title: cancelling delete dialog keeps user on edit page
bottle still appears in list after cancelled delete

suites.title: US-4.1: Search Bottles by Partial Name

specs.title: search input is rendered at the top of list page
partial name search narrows the list
non-matching bottles are not shown
URL updates to include ?q= when search is active
search input pre-populated with current ?q= on page load

suites.title: US-4.2: Search Is Case-Insensitive

specs.title: searching "caymus" finds bottle named "Caymus"
searching "CAYMUS" finds the same bottle
searching "CaYmUs" finds the same bottle

suites.title: US-4.3: Search Empty State — No Matching Bottles

specs.title: search empty state shows message containing the search term
search-empty message distinct from cellar-empty message
"Add bottle" button accessible in search-empty state

suites.title: US-4.4: Clear Search Restores Full List

specs.title: navigating to / without query shows full list
clearing search restores full bottle list

suites.title: US-4.5: Search State Persists on Page Reload

specs.title: loading /?q=caymus directly shows filtered list
reloading /?q=caymus preserves filtered list
search input pre-populated with "caymus" after reload

suites.title: US-5.1: Health Check Endpoint

specs.title: GET /api/health returns 200 with {"status":"ok"}
Content-Type is application/json

suites.title: US-5.2: List All Bottles via API

specs.title: GET /api/bottles returns 200 with array
each bottle includes required fields
GET /api/bottles returns [] when empty
GET /api/bottles?q=caymus returns only matching bottles

suites.title: US-5.3: Create a Bottle via API

specs.title: POST /api/bottles returns 201 with created bottle
POST /api/bottles without name returns 422 with error
POST /api/bottles with quantity=0 returns 422

suites.title: US-5.4: Fetch Single Bottle via API

specs.title: GET /api/bottles/[id] returns 200 for existing bottle
GET /api/bottles/99999 returns 404 with {"error":"Not found"}
GET /api/bottles/abc returns 404

suites.title: US-5.5: Update a Bottle via API

specs.title: PUT /api/bottles/[id] returns 200 with updated bottle
PUT with quantity=0 returns 200 (zero allowed on edit)
PUT with quantity=-1 returns 422
PUT /api/bottles/99999 returns 404

suites.title: US-5.6: Delete a Bottle via API

specs.title: DELETE /api/bottles/[id] returns 204
deleted bottle no longer in GET /api/bottles
DELETE /api/bottles/99999 returns 404

suites.title: US-6.1 & US-6.2: Migration Runs Automatically

specs.title: POST /api/bottles successfully inserts (confirms table exists)

suites.title: US-6.4: Data Persists Across Server Restarts (Page Reload)

specs.title: bottle added via form appears after page reload
bottle added via form appears after navigating away and back

suites.title: US-7.1: App Usable on 375px Mobile

specs.title: home page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px
/bottles/new renders without horizontal scroll at 375px

suites.title: US-7.2: App Readable on Desktop at 1440px

specs.title: home page renders without overlapping elements at 1440px

suites.title: US-7.3: Primary Buttons Use Gold Accent Color

specs.title: submit button on add-bottle form uses #FBCA5C

suites.title: US-7.4: All Form Inputs Have Visible Labels

specs.title: /bottles/new — every input has a visible label

suites.title: US-7.5: App Loads Inside iframe Without Being Blocked

specs.title: response headers do not include X-Frame-Options: DENY
next.config.mjs file is a .mjs ESM file
